title: Iran Prepares for Days of Mourning Following Death of Supreme Leader
subtitle: As the nation says goodbye to Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, officials aim to show strength during a time of regional uncertainty.

summary.en: Iran is preparing for a massive, multi-day funeral ceremony for the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Millions of people are expected to participate in events across the country to honor the leader who died following a recent war. Foreign dignitaries from several nations have arrived in Tehran to pay their respects. The government hopes this show of unity will strengthen its position in ongoing international negotiations. Meanwhile, the country faces a leadership transition as the late leader's son, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, takes over.
summary.zh: 伊朗正為已故最高領袖阿里·哈米尼籌備一場大規模、為期數日的葬禮。預計全國將有數百萬民眾參與活動，以紀念這位在近期戰爭後逝世的領袖。來自多國的外國政要已抵達德黑蘭致哀。政府希望透過展現團結，能強化其在國際談判中的立場。與此同時，隨著已故領袖之子莫吉塔巴·哈米尼接任，國家正面臨領導層的過渡。

paragraphs.en: Iran is currently preparing for a series of funeral ceremonies for the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. The 86-year-old leader died following a recent war, and the country is now bracing for days of public mourning. According to NPR News, the government expects millions of people to flood the streets of Tehran starting Saturday, in scenes that remind many observers of the 1989 burial of the former leader, Ayatollah Ruhollah Khomeini.
paragraphs.zh: 伊朗目前正為已故最高領袖阿里·哈米尼（Ayatollah Ali Khamenei）籌備一系列葬禮儀式。這位八十六歲的領袖在近期的一場戰爭後逝世，全國正準備迎接為期數日的公開哀悼。根據美國國家公共廣播電台（NPR News）報導，政府預計從週六開始，將有數百萬民眾湧入德黑蘭街頭，此情此景讓許多觀察家回想起一九八九年已故前領袖魯霍拉·柯梅尼（Ayatollah Ruhollah Khomeini）的葬禮。

paragraphs.en: The funeral plans are extensive and will span several days. After the ceremonies in Tehran, the coffin will be moved to other cities, including the holy city of Qom. The coffin will also be taken to Iraq before the final burial in the leader's hometown of Mashhad on Thursday. During this period, Deutsche Welle (DW) reports that Iranian authorities will close much of the country's airspace and block many city streets for security reasons.
paragraphs.zh: 葬禮計畫規模龐大，將持續數日。在德黑蘭的儀式結束後，靈柩將被移往包括聖城庫姆（Qom）在內的其他城市。在週四於領袖家鄉馬什哈德（Mashhad）進行最終安葬前，靈柩也將被送往伊拉克。德國之聲（DW）報導指出，在此期間，伊朗當局基於安全考量，將關閉國內大部分領空並封鎖許多城市街道。

paragraphs.en: At the center of these events is the Grand Mosalla Mosque in Tehran, where the coffin has been placed. It is draped in a red flag featuring white calligraphy, which serves as a symbol of both the blood of those killed and a call for justice. The late leader's casket sits alongside the remains of family members who were killed during an Israeli airstrike at the very start of the war on February 28. These family members include his son-in-law, his eldest daughter, and a young granddaughter. The wife of Iran’s new Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, was also among those killed in the attack. The new leader remains in hiding after reportedly suffering injuries during the same event.
paragraphs.zh: 這些活動的核心位於德黑蘭的大莫薩拉清真寺（Grand Mosalla Mosque），靈柩目前安置於此。靈柩覆蓋著一面印有白色書法字樣的紅旗，象徵著犧牲者的鮮血以及對正義的呼喚。已故領袖的靈柩旁，安放著其家人的遺體，他們於二月二十八日戰爭爆發之初，在以色列的空襲中喪生。這些家人包括他的女婿、長女以及一名年幼的孫女。伊朗新任最高領袖莫吉塔巴·哈米尼（Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei）的妻子也在該次攻擊中身亡。據報導，新任領袖在同一事件中受傷，目前仍處於隱蔽狀態。

paragraphs.en: The funeral has drawn attention from across the globe. According to reports from Deutsche Welle (DW), representatives from countries including China, Russia, Iraq, India, and Pakistan have arrived in Tehran to pay their respects. The Afghan Foreign Minister, representing the Taliban, was also seen at the ceremonies. Additionally, family members of Hassan Nasrallah, the leader of the Lebanese group Hezbollah, were in attendance. The presence of these foreign dignitaries is seen by many as a way for Iran to demonstrate its continued influence and support on the international stage.
paragraphs.zh: 這場葬禮吸引了全球關注。根據德國之聲的報導，來自中國、俄羅斯、伊拉克、印度與巴基斯坦等國的代表已抵達德黑蘭致哀。代表塔利班（Taliban）的阿富汗外交部長也出席了儀式。此外，黎巴嫩組織真主黨（Hezbollah）領袖哈桑·納斯魯拉（Hassan Nasrallah）的家屬亦在場。許多人認為，這些外國政要的出席，是伊朗向國際舞台展示其持續影響力與支持度的一種方式。

paragraphs.en: For the Iranian government, these events are about more than just mourning. NPR News notes that the leadership hopes the public displays of support will provide a boost to the government as it continues difficult negotiations with the United States. These talks aim to reach a permanent end to the war. By showing a united front, the government hopes to maintain its control over key areas, such as the Strait of Hormuz, a vital waterway for global shipping.
paragraphs.zh: 對伊朗政府而言，這些活動不僅僅是為了哀悼。美國國家公共廣播電台指出，領導層希望透過公開展現支持，能為政府在與美國進行艱難談判時提供助力。這些會談旨在為戰爭尋求永久終結。透過展現團結一致的立場，政府希望維持對關鍵區域的控制，例如作為全球航運命脈的荷莫茲海峽（Strait of Hormuz）。

paragraphs.en: A significant moment during the preparations was the public appearance of General Ahmad Vahidi, a high-ranking member of the Revolutionary Guard. According to Deutsche Welle (DW), this was the first time the general had been seen in public in months. General Vahidi is a key figure in the country’s tough stance during negotiations with the United States. His return to the public eye, alongside other top officials like President Masoud Pezeshkian and the Parliament speaker, is viewed as a clear signal of the government's stability and strength.
paragraphs.zh: 在籌備期間的一個重要時刻，是革命衛隊（Revolutionary Guard）高階成員艾哈邁德·瓦希迪（Ahmad Vahidi）將軍公開露面。根據德國之聲報導，這是該位將軍數月來首次公開現身。瓦希迪將軍是伊朗在與美國談判中採取強硬立場的關鍵人物。他與總統馬蘇德·佩澤希齊揚（Masoud Pezeshkian）及國會議長等高層官員一同重回公眾視野，被視為政府穩定與實力的明確訊號。

paragraphs.en: Despite the challenges, supporters of the Islamic Republic remain firm in their beliefs. Mohammad Hossein Rezaei, a volunteer helping with the funeral preparations, told NPR News that the people would continue to pursue independence. He stated that the country would keep following the policy of "no to humiliation" established by the previous leadership. He emphasized that future decisions would be made within Iran, allowing the people to decide their own fate.
paragraphs.zh: 儘管面臨挑戰，伊斯蘭共和國的支持者仍堅守信念。協助葬禮籌備工作的志工穆罕默德·侯賽因·雷扎伊（Mohammad Hossein Rezaei）告訴美國國家公共廣播電台，人民將繼續追求獨立。他表示，國家將持續遵循前任領導層所確立的「拒絕屈辱」政策。他強調，未來的決策將在伊朗國內做出，讓人民決定自己的命運。

paragraphs.en: As the nation moves through this period of transition, the mood remains heavy with both grief and political tension. The government is working to ensure that the funeral serves as a turning point, using the memory of the late leader to rally the public. Whether these efforts will succeed in stabilizing the nation’s position in its ongoing conflict remains to be seen. For now, the focus of the entire country is on the streets of Tehran and the final journey of the man who led the nation for decades.
paragraphs.zh: 隨著國家經歷這段過渡期，社會氛圍仍籠罩在悲傷與政治緊張之中。政府正努力確保葬禮成為一個轉捩點，利用對已故領袖的懷念來凝聚民心。這些努力能否成功穩定國家在持續衝突中的處境，仍有待觀察。目前，全國的焦點都集中在德黑蘭的街頭，以及這位領導國家數十年的領袖最後的旅程。

keyTerms.definitionEn: Preparing for something difficult or unpleasant.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 準備迎接（通常指困難或不愉快的事）。
keyTerms.noteZh: brace 常見作名詞（支架），這裡作動詞用，表示心理準備。文中：the country is now bracing for days of public mourning.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To arrive or go somewhere in large numbers.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（洪水），這裡用來形容人群大量移動。文中：the government expects millions of people to flood the streets of Tehran starting Saturday

keyTerms.definitionEn: An action or event that helps something to increase or become more successful.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作動詞（推動），這裡作名詞用。文中：NPR News notes that the leadership hopes the public displays of support will provide a boost to the government as it continues difficult negotiations with the United States.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To bring people together to support a cause or to work towards a goal.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（集會），這裡作動詞用，表示激勵人心。文中：The government is working to ensure that the funeral serves as a turning point, using the memory of the late leader to rally the public.

sources.name: NPR News
sources.title: Iran plans dayslong funeral for Supreme Leader Khamenei after war death

sources.name: Deutsche Welle (DW) Top
sources.title: Iran: Dignitaries arrive for Ayatollah Khamenei's funeral

quiz.question: Which family members were buried alongside the late Supreme Leader at the Grand Mosalla Mosque?

options.A: His wife and his eldest son.
options.B: His son-in-law, eldest daughter, and a young granddaughter.
options.C: His brother and his new successor, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei.
options.D: The entire family of the new Supreme Leader.

quiz.explanationZh: 根據文章第三段，文中明確提到已故領袖的靈柩旁放置著在2月28日以色列空襲中喪生的家人，包括他的女婿、長女以及一個年幼的孫女。選項 A 錯誤，因為文中未提及長子；選項 C 錯誤，因為新任領袖 Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei 本人並未在空襲中喪生，只是他的妻子不幸遇難；選項 D 誇大了受害者範圍，文中僅列出特定親屬。

quiz.question: Based on the text, why is the appearance of General Ahmad Vahidi considered significant by observers?

options.A: He is the person responsible for organizing the funeral logistics.
options.B: He has been in hiding due to his involvement in the war against Iraq.
options.C: His public presence suggests the government is maintaining internal stability and authority.
options.D: He is expected to replace the current President in the upcoming negotiations.

quiz.explanationZh: 根據文章第六段，General Ahmad Vahidi 是革命衛隊的高層，且在談判中態度強硬。文章指出他的公開露面與其他高層官員一同出現，被視為政府穩定與力量的明確信號。選項 A 錯誤，文中未指派他負責物流；選項 B 錯誤，他是因為戰時局勢隱身，而非因為與伊拉克戰爭有關；選項 D 錯誤，文中並未提到他要取代總統。

quiz.question: In the final paragraph, what does the word 'rally' mean as used in the context: '...using the memory of the late leader to rally the public'?

options.A: To cause the public to come together in support of a cause.
options.B: To organize a race or a competitive sporting event.
options.C: To criticize the government's recent political failures.
options.D: To force citizens to leave the streets of Tehran.

quiz.explanationZh: 在此語境中，rally 的意思是「團結」或「號召」民眾。政府試圖利用已故領袖的記憶來凝聚民心，以支持政府的政治目標。選項 B 是指賽車或體育競賽，在此不適用；選項 C 與文意相反，政府是為了爭取支持而非被批評；選項 D 錯誤，政府是希望民眾走上街頭展現團結，而非驅趕民眾。

quiz.question: What is the primary purpose of the funeral ceremonies described in the article?

options.A: To celebrate the military victory of Iran over its regional enemies.
options.B: To officially transfer power to the new Supreme Leader in a private setting.
options.C: To mourn the loss of the leader while simultaneously projecting political strength and unity.
options.D: To invite foreign leaders to discuss new trade agreements and economic policies.

quiz.explanationZh: 文章整體重點在於描述已故領袖的葬禮，並強調政府如何利用此機會展示國際影響力（第四段）、爭取民眾支持以應對美國談判（第五段），以及展現政府的穩定性（第六段）。選項 A 錯誤，文中未稱之為勝利；選項 B 錯誤，葬禮是公開活動；選項 D 錯誤，外交官員出席是為了展現影響力，並非主要為了貿易談判。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
